subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-03 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: A certain one inquired of him concerning a perfect one, whereupon he made mention of a person in Nishábúr. According to that which was indicated regarding the state of the aforementioned person [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخصی از او از [شخص] کاملی پرسید، او هم اشاره به شخصی در نیشابور کرد. حسب الاشاره از حال شخص مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation, @empty learning; false spirituality, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures
